Name: SP_EFFECT_VFX_PARAM_ST
Description: Determines the parameters for particles triggered via SpEffect.

Fields.Name: Continuous: Particle ID
Fields.Description: The SFX ID to use for the particle that is displayed continuously.

Fields.Name: Continuous: Sound ID
Fields.Description: The sound ID to use for the particle that is displayed continuously.

Fields.Name: Start: Particle ID
Fields.Description: The SFX ID to use for the particle that appears when the effect starts.

Fields.Name: Start: Sound ID
Fields.Description: The sound ID to use for the particle that appears when the effect starts.

Fields.Name: End: Particle ID
Fields.Description: The SFX ID to use for the particle that appears when the effect ends.

Fields.Name: End: Sound ID
Fields.Description: The sound ID to use for the particle that appears when the effect ends.

Fields.Name: Invisibility: Start Distance
Fields.Description: When hiding the owner via this effect, this is the start distance for the invisibility.

Fields.Name: Invisibility: End Distance
Fields.Description: When hiding the owner via this effect, this is the end distance for the invisibility.

Fields.Name: Transformation: Armor ID
Fields.Description: The armor ID to draw from when overriding the owner's current equipment (visually).

Fields.Name: Continuous: Dummy Polygon ID
Fields.Description: The dummy polygon ID to use for the particle that is displayed continuously.

Fields.Name: Start: Dummy Polygon ID
Fields.Description: The dummy polygon ID to use for the particle that appears when the effect starts.

Fields.Name: End: Dummy Polygon ID
Fields.Description: The dummy polygon ID to use for the particle that appears when the effect end.

Fields.Name: Particle Type
Fields.Description: The particle type for this effect.

Fields.Name: Shader for Weapon Enchantment
Fields.Description: The shader type to display on the weapon of the effect owner.

Fields.Name: Playback Category
Fields.Description: The playback category for the effect, controls playback if multiple effects overlap.

Fields.Name: Playback Priority
Fields.Description: The priority to give this effect if it overlaps with another.

Fields.Name: Apply NPC Particle Offset
Fields.Description: Offsets particle ID according to target's NpcParam sfxSize.

Fields.Name: Apply Shader Offset
Fields.Description: Offsets shader ID according to target's weapon.

Fields.Name: Hide Playback when Hidden
Fields.Description: If ON, playback of the effect is stopped whilst the owner is hidden.

Fields.Name: Apply Invisibility
Fields.Description: If ON, the invisibility fields are enabled, allowing invisibility.

Fields.Name: Apply Invisibility against Friends
Fields.Description: If ON, invisibility will hide the owner for friendly characters too.

Fields.Name: Map Particle Offset
Fields.Description: If defined, the particle ID will be prefixed with the map ID it is present in, and the FFX will be looked for within the map's FFX container.

Fields.Name: Is Partial Invisibility
Fields.Description: If ON, invisibility is only semi-transparent, not total.

Fields.Name: Apply Transformation to Full Body
Fields.Description: If ON, the transformation ID will apply to all armor slots.

Fields.Name: Hide Right-Hand Weapon
Fields.Description: If ON, the effect will make the right-hand weapon of the owner invisible.

Fields.Name: Suppress Sound
Fields.Description: If ON, the effect owner produces no sound.
